title: Truegreen7's Gardevoir Variant
description: Implements a new Dark/Ghost variant for Gardevoir by Truegreen7 into Cobblemon!
body:
This Cobblemon datapack introduces a new variant for Gardevoir (and its pre-evolutions) based on the Gardevoir design by Truegreen7!

- Spawns in the Deep Dark biome
- Dark/Ghost Gardevoir line's models and textures made by me (Using the original Cobblemon assets as a base)
- Original Gardevoir evolution line's models, textures, and animations by the Cobblemon dev team
- Gardevoir design (including shiny form) by Truegreen7 (Source: https://youtu.be/8Uz61afdnoU?si=sMThA8zObcPs-cmN)
- Ralts and Kirlia variant designs by me
- Works with Cobblemon 1.6.1 (Minecraft 1.21.1), might work in other versions but I can't say for sure
